zh.Anlaby, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾安拉比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Moyne於1299年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾安拉比時，她的父親William Le Moyne of Maddington25歲，母親Alice Trenchard15歲。她和William Legard至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1330年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Moyne于1299年出生在英国英格兰越可爾安拉比时，她的父亲William Le Moyne of Maddington25岁，母亲Alice Trenchard15岁。她和William Legard至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1330年在英国英格兰素福爾可享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: nickname from Old French moine, Anglo-Norman French muine, moingne ‘monk’. Some of the following early bearers without the definite article could alternatively belong with (2).

variants.name: Moin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Moyne, a nickname from Old French moine, Anglo-Norman French muine, moingne ‘monk’.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Moynan
meanings: Irish: perhaps a diminutive of   Moyne   or a reduced form of   Moynihan  .

variants.name: Moine
meanings: French: from moine ‘monk’, probably applied as an occupational name for a servant at a monastery or an ironic nickname for someone of monkish behavior or appearance. Compare Lemoine .

variants.name: Moynes
meanings: English: variant of Moyne with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Moyne was born in 1299, in Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Le Moyne of Maddington, was 25 and her mother, Alice Trenchard, was 15. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with William Legard. She died in 1330, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Moyne est née en 1299, à Anlaby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Le Moyne of Maddington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Trenchard, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec William Legard. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Moyne 1299 in Anlaby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Le Moyne of Maddington 25 und ihre Mutter Alice Trenchard 15. Sie hatte mit William Legard mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1330 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Moyne è nata il nel 1299 nel Anlaby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Le Moyne of Maddington, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice Trenchard, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con William Legard. Morì nel 1330, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Moyneが1299年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアンラビーで生まれた時，父William Le Moyne of Maddingtonは25歳，母Alice Trenchardは15歳であった。彼女はWilliam Legardとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1330年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Moyne(이)가 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Le Moyne of Maddington(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Trenchard(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 William Legard(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Moyne родилась в 1299 г. в местности анлаби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Le Moyne of Maddington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Trenchard, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от William Legard. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con William Legard. Murió en 1330, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
